---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve DarkCore CMS
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: xDarkheim
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happens.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

| Key | Value |
|-----|-------|
| DarkCore CMS version | e.g. 0.1.0 |
| PHP version | e.g. 8.4.x |
| OS / Server | e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 / Docker |
| MU Emulator | e.g. X-Team, MuEmu, Louis, Darkheim |
| Browser (if frontend issue) | e.g. Chrome 123 |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, config snippets, etc.).

> **Note:** Never paste credentials, passwords, or private keys in issues.
